query: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.check_deleted_email(check_email TEXT) RETURNS TABLE(is_blocked BOOLEAN, cooldown_remaining INTERVAL) AS $$ BEGIN RETURN QUERY SELECT TRUE as is_blocked, (da.cooldown_until - NOW()) as cooldown_remaining FROM public.deleted_accounts da WHERE da.email = check_email AND da.cooldown_until > NOW() ORDER BY da.deleted_at DESC LIMIT 1; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.check_deleted_email(TEXT) TO anon; GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.check_deleted_email(TEXT) TO authenticated;
